world.name: Relics of the Athenaeum
world.premise: The party restored the Codex Machina and now discovers that fragments of the Athenaeum's memory persist in ordinary places.
world.tone: warm adventure with mystery, banter, and latent consequence

timeline.summary: The party celebrates at the Last Lantern after restoring the Codex Machina.
The tavern reveals that it was built from archive stone and keeps one of the Athenaeum's outer doors.

characters.name: Mara Underbough
characters.state: Tavernkeep of the Last Lantern; knows the house rules and now understands her tavern keeps an Athenaeum door.
relationships: Treats the party as debt-bearing regulars

characters.name: Thorne the Sentinel
characters.state: Still protective of the Codex and skeptical of celebratory magic.
relationships: Distrusts any demand to return the Codex

characters.name: Kael the Chronicler
characters.state: Interested in the Last Lantern as a primary source and architectural memory site.

locations.name: The Last Lantern
locations.state: A tavern built from archive stone; contains or guards an outer Athenaeum door.
relationships: The chimney may hold a small silver presence

open_threads.summary: Something small and silver laughed in the chimney after the wall accepted the returned page.
The tavern keeps an Athenaeum door, but the destination and rules are unknown.
